BIMsnap

Browser-native AEC asset creation for designers.

Upload a furniture or lighting photo, strip the background, and export optimized CAD geometry for Revit, Rhino, SketchUp, and Vectorworks without server render time.

Workflow

  • Upload an image of furniture or lighting.
  • Review the auto-isolated subject preview.
  • Adjust dimensions, category, and poly density.
  • Generate and export CAD-ready .OBJ/.GLB files.

Image Uploader

Drop a photo and the workspace will isolate the subject.

Drag & drop or browse an image to start.

Asset details

Set name, category, and final physical size.

Preview physical scale

Your model will normalize to exact physical dimensions before export.

24 in × 18 in × 12 in

CAD export

Generate optimized geometry for common AEC platforms.

3D Viewport

Live model preview

Medium: ~15,000 polys
